'''hayab''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:brothers|brothers]] (uterine siblings)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:brothers|brothers]] (uterine siblings)
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæyibith|hæyibith]] || [[word:hæyibij|hæyibij]] || [[word:hæyibish|hæyibish]] || [[word:hæyibi|hæyibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hayuyubuth|hayuyubuth]] || [[word:hayuyubuj|hayuyubuj]] || [[word:hayuyubush|hayuyubush]] || [[word:hayuyubu|hayuyubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hayubuth|hayubuth]] || [[word:hayubuj|hayubuj]] || [[word:hayubush|hayubush]] || [[word:hayubu|hayubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hayufbuth|hayufbuth]] || [[word:hayufbuj|hayufbuj]] || [[word:hayufbush|hayufbush]] || [[word:hayufbuf|hayufbuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæyebeth|hæyebeth]] || [[word:hæyebej|hæyebej]] || [[word:hæyebesh|hæyebesh]] || [[word:hæyebe|hæyebe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hayoyoboth|hayoyoboth]] || [[word:hayoyoboj|hayoyoboj]] || [[word:hayoyobosh|hayoyobosh]] || [[word:hayoyobo|hayoyobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hayoboth|hayoboth]] || [[word:hayoboj|hayoboj]] || [[word:hayobosh|hayobosh]] || [[word:hayobo|hayobo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hayofboth|hayofboth]] || [[word:hayofboj|hayofboj]] || [[word:hayofbosh|hayofbosh]] || [[word:hayofbof|hayofbof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || — || — || — || [[word:hayïfbïf|hayïfbïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || — || — || — || [[word:hayïfyïfbïf|hayïfyïfbïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæyæbæth|hæyæbæth]] || [[word:hæyæbæj|hæyæbæj]] || [[word:hæyæbæsh|hæyæbæsh]] || [[word:hæyæbæ|hæyæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hayayabath|hayayabath]] || [[word:hayayabaj|hayayabaj]] || [[word:hayayabash|hayayabash]] || [[word:hayayaba|hayayaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hayabath|hayabath]] || [[word:hayabaj|hayabaj]] || [[word:hayabash|hayabash]] || [[word:hayaba|hayaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hayafbath|hayafbath]] || [[word:hayafbaj|hayafbaj]] || [[word:hayafbash|hayafbash]] || [[word:hayafbaf|hayafbaf]]
|}

''50 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hayabatha|hayabatha]] || [[word:hayabaja|hayabaja]] || [[word:hayabasha|hayabasha]] || [[word:hayabaka|hayabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hayabath|hayabath]] || [[word:hayabaj|hayabaj]] || [[word:hayabash|hayabash]] || [[word:hayaba|hayaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hayabathal|hayabathal]] || [[word:hayabajal|hayabajal]] || [[word:hayabashal|hayabashal]] || [[word:hayabakal|hayabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hayabathatha|hayabathatha]] || [[word:hayabajaja|hayabajaja]] || [[word:hayabashasha|hayabashasha]] || [[word:hayabaka|hayabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hayabathan|hayabathan]] || [[word:hayabajan|hayabajan]] || [[word:hayabashan|hayabashan]] || [[word:hayabakan|hayabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hayabathaoro|hayabathaoro]] || [[word:hayabajaoro|hayabajaoro]] || [[word:hayabashaoro|hayabashaoro]] || [[word:hayabakaoro|hayabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
